title: 10 Stocks That Could Benefit From the FIFA World Cup 2022
text: The FIFA 2022 World Cup is currently underway and is scheduled to run till December 18.

title: Marriott International, Inc. (MAR) Barclays 8th Eat, Sleep, Play Conference (Transcript)
text: Marriott International, Inc. (NASDAQ:MAR ) Barclays 8th Eat, Sleep, Play Conference November 30, 2022 8:45 AM ET Company Participants Leeny Oberg - Chief Financial Officer and Executive Vice President, Business Operations Conference Call Participants Brandt Montour - Barclays Capital Brandt Montour I am very excited to have the CFO of Marriott here, Leeny Oberg, in town for not only this, but their annual Christmas party later this week, which is famous for tiny cupcakes. Right? Leeny Oberg I was going to say every year we try to come up with something new.

title: Jenny Harrington recommends these two services stocks for 2023
text: U.S consumer will continue to spend on services even if the economy slides into a mild recession in 2023, says Jenny Harrington of Gillman Hill Asset Management. Harrington recommends owning Marriott stock Enormous spending was a feature of the pandemic.

title: Check Into The Hotel Rebound With These Welcoming Stocks
text: The hotel industry is experiencing a rebound that will slow but not end for at least the next 5 years and these stocks dominate the market.

title: Here's Why You Should Retain Marriott (MAR) in Your Portfolio
text: Marriott's (MAR) emphasis on new development and multiunit conversion opportunities bodes well. However, constrained RevPAR in Greater China and Asia Pacific is a concern.

title: 7 Best Hotel Stocks to Buy Now
text: The central thesis for buying hotel stocks right now is a belief that demand for travel will continue. And if that's true, then the best hotel stocks will offer investors a combination of value and growth.

title: Marriott International CFO to Speak at the Barclays 2022 Eat, Sleep, Play Conference November 30, 2022; Remarks to Be Webcast
text: BETHESDA, Md. , Nov. 18, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Leeny Oberg, Chief Financial Officer and Executive Vice President, Business Operations at Marriott International, Inc., will speak at the Barclays 2022 Eat, Sleep, Play Conference, to be held on Wednesday, November 30, 2022, in New York, NY.

title: Marriott International Declares an Increase in Quarterly Cash Dividend and Increases Share Buyback Authorization
text: BETHESDA, Md. , Nov. 10, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Marriott International, Inc., (NASDAQ: MAR) today announced that its board of directors declared a quarterly cash dividend of 40 cents per share of common stock, which represents a 33 percent increase over the previous quarterly dividend amount of 30 cents per share and reflects the company's earnings growth and strong cash generation.

title: Marriott International Introduces Apartments by Marriott Bonvoy, Responding to Growing Consumer Demand As Travelers Increasingly Blend Work And Leisure
text: New offering expected to spur development opportunities globally BETHESDA, Md. , Nov. 9, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Marriott International, Inc., today announced its expansion into apartment-style accommodations with the launch of Apartments by Marriott Bonvoy™.

title: THE RITZ-CARLTON, SOUTH BEACH CHAMPIONS LOCAL ARTISTS FOR MIAMI ART WEEK 2022 AND CONTINUES ART FOR GOOD INITIATIVE
text: To celebrate the 70 years the Morris Lapidus property has stood and Miami's remarkable culture, the iconic hotel will center its Art For Good program on showcasing the talents of local artists across multiple disciplines, including innovative design and dynamic music. MIAMI , Nov. 9, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- The Ritz-Carlton, South Beach - together with hotel ownership from the Ben Josef, Kanavos, and Lowenstein families - is extremely proud to continue its Art For Good program this Miami Art Week 2022 by celebrating 70 years of the landmark Morris Lapidus building as a cornerstone of South Beach.

title: Marriott (MAR) Q3 Earnings Match Estimates, Revenues Top
text: Marriott's (MAR) third-quarter 2022 top line benefits from strength in lodging demand and unit growth. Solid contributions from co-brand credit card fees added to the upside.

title: Marriott tops profit and revenue expectations as RevPAR tops pre-pandemic levels
text: Marriott International Inc. MAR, -4.42% reported Thursday third-quarter profit and revenue that topped expectations, as revenue per available room (RevPAR) rose above 2019 levels. The hotel operator's stock was still inactive in the premarket.

title: MARRIOTT INTERNATIONAL REPORTS OUTSTANDING THIRD QUARTER 2022 RESULTS
text: Third quarter 2022 comparable systemwide constant dollar RevPAR increased 36.3 percent worldwide, 28.5 percent in the U.S. & Canada, and 66.1 percent in international markets, compared to the 2021 third quarter;  Third quarter 2022 comparable systemwide constant dollar RevPAR increased 1.8 percent worldwide and 3.5 percent in the U.S. & Canada, while RevPAR declined 2.4 percent in international markets, compared to the 2019 third quarter;  Third quarter reported diluted EPS totaled $1.94, compared to reported diluted EPS of $0.67 in the year-ago quarter.  Third quarter adjusted diluted EPS totaled $1.69, compared to third quarter 2021 adjusted diluted EPS of $0.99; Third quarter reported net income totaled $630 million, compared to reported net income of $220 million in the year-ago quarter.

title: St. Regis Hotels & Resorts to Debut in Costa Mujeres, Mexico
text: The iconic luxury brand to expand its footprint in Mexico with The St. Regis Costa Mujeres Resort BETHESDA, Md. , Nov. 2, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Marriott International, Inc., today announced it has signed an agreement with AB Living to bring the legendary St. Regis brand to Costa Mujeres.
